ntpl_hint_type_locked: Type slug is fixed after creation
ntpl_hint_body: Use placeholder tokens (in curly braces). Reserved Python format syntax like x.__class__ is rejected.

ntpl_preview_context_hint: Object with keys matching the placeholders in the body. brand is filled automatically.
